query: INSERT INTO seasons (id, name, startDate, endDate, isActive, createdAt) VALUES (1, 'Sample Season', '2026-01-01', '2026-12-31', 0, NOW()); UPDATE games SET seasonId = 1 WHERE seasonId IN (60003, 60004, 90001, 90002);
